InputKeyboard.Description: Delay=0 (250ms), Speed=31. Driver kbdclass buffer ridotto. i8042prt PollStatusIterations=1. Sticky/Filter/Toggle Keys OFF.

InputMouse.Description: Accelerazione OFF. Curva 1:1 lineare (nessun smoothing Windows). Driver mouclass + mouhid buffer ridotto.
InvokeScript: $cx=[byte[]](0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0xC0,0xCC,0x0C,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x80,0x99,0x19,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x40,0x66,0x26,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x33,0x33,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00); $cy=[byte[]](0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x38,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x70,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0xA8,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0xE0,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00); Set-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Mouse' -Name 'SmoothMouseXCurve' -Value $cx -Type Binary -Force; Set-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Mouse' -Name 'SmoothMouseYCurve' -Value $cy -Type Binary -Force; Write-FOMLog 'Curva 1:1 applicata' 'OK'
UndoScript: Remove-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Mouse' -Name 'SmoothMouseXCurve' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Mouse' -Name 'SmoothMouseYCurve' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'Curve mouse rimosse (Windows usera curva default)' 'OK'

InputUSBHID.Description: Selective Suspend OFF. Power management OFF su tutti i dispositivi USB. IRQ 8 e 12 prioritizzati. HidUsb configurato.
InvokeScript: powercfg /SETACVALUEINDEX SCHEME_CURRENT 2a737441-1930-4402-8d77-b2bebba308a3 48e6b7a6-50f5-4782-a5d4-53bb8f07e226 0 2>$null; powercfg /SETDCVALUEINDEX SCHEME_CURRENT 2a737441-1930-4402-8d77-b2bebba308a3 48e6b7a6-50f5-4782-a5d4-53bb8f07e226 0 2>$null; powercfg /setactive SCHEME_CURRENT 2>$null; $devs = Get-PnpDevice -Class 'USB' -Status 'OK' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $c=0; foreach ($d in $devs) { $rp = 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\' + $d.InstanceId + '\Device Parameters'; if (Test-Path $rp) { Set-ItemProperty $rp -Name 'EnhancedPowerManagementEnabled' -Value 0 -Type DWord -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $c++ } }; Write-FOMLog "USB power management disabilitato su $c dispositivi" 'OK'
UndoScript: powercfg /SETACVALUEINDEX SCHEME_CURRENT 2a737441-1930-4402-8d77-b2bebba308a3 48e6b7a6-50f5-4782-a5d4-53bb8f07e226 1 2>$null; powercfg /setactive SCHEME_CURRENT 2>$null; Write-FOMLog 'USB Selective Suspend ripristinato' 'OK'

InputUSBCpuDirect.Description: Scarica e lancia cpu-direct-usb: mappa i controller USB per latenza (CHIP 0=diretto CPU best, CHIP 1=via chipset, CHIP 2+=hub). Mostra quale porta usare per mouse/tastiera. Strumento interattivo in nuova finestra.
InvokeScript: $d="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)\tools\cpudirect"; $s="$d\cpudirect.ps1"; if(-not(Test-Path $s)){ Write-FOMLog 'Download cpu-direct-usb da GitHub...' 'INFO'; try{ New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d -Force -EA SilentlyContinue|Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MariusHeier/cpu-direct-usb/main/cpudirect.ps1' -OutFile $s -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; Write-FOMLog 'cpudirect.ps1 scaricato in tools\cpudirect\' 'OK' }catch{ Write-FOMLog "Errore download: $($_.Exception.Message)" 'ERROR'; return } }else{ Write-FOMLog 'cpudirect.ps1 gia presente in tools\cpudirect\' 'INFO' }; Start-Process powershell.exe -ArgumentList @('-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-NoExit','-File',$s) -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'CPU Direct USB aperto — CHIP 0=porta migliore per mouse/tastiera. Usa il menu interattivo per applicare ottimizzazioni.' 'OK'
UndoScript: $d="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)\tools\cpudirect"; if(Test-Path $d){ Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'cpudirect.ps1 rimosso da tools\cpudirect\' 'OK' }else{ Write-FOMLog 'cpudirect non era installato' 'INFO' }

GamingGameMode.Description: AllowAutoGameMode=1. SystemResponsiveness=0, NetworkThrottlingIndex=OFF. GPU Priority=8, CPU Priority=6. Scheduling dedicato.

GamingGameBarDVR.Description: Rimuove hook DirectX del Game DVR. Elimina overlay e cattura audio in background. Libera CPU e GPU.

GamingIFEO.Description: CpuPriorityClass=High, IoPriority=High, PagePriority=High tramite IFEO. Permanente, senza Task Manager.

GamingNagle.Description: TcpAckFrequency=1 + TCPNoDelay=1 su tutte le interfacce di rete. Ping piu basso, meno jitter su server FiveM.
InvokeScript: $p = 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces'; $n = 0; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Set-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'TcpAckFrequency' -Value 1 -Type DWord -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'TCPNoDelay' -Value 1 -Type DWord -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $n++ }; Write-FOMLog "Nagle disabilitato su $n interfacce" 'OK'
UndoScript: $p = 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces'; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Remove-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'TcpAckFrequency' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-ItemProperty $_.PSPath -Name 'TCPNoDelay' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'Nagle ripristinato' 'OK'

GamingTimer.Description: bcdedit: disabledynamictick=yes, useplatformclock=true. Frame time piu stabile. Richiede riavvio.
InvokeScript: bcdedit /set disabledynamictick yes 2>$null | Out-Null; bcdedit /set useplatformclock true 2>$null | Out-Null; bcdedit /set useplatformatick yes 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'Timer 0.5ms attivato (effetto dopo riavvio)' 'OK'
UndoScript: bcdedit /set disabledynamictick no 2>$null | Out-Null; bcdedit /set useplatformclock false 2>$null | Out-Null; bcdedit /deletevalue useplatformatick 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'Timer resolution ripristinato (effetto dopo riavvio)' 'OK'

GamingVisuals.Description: Disabilita animazioni, trasparenze e ombre Aero. Libera risorse GPU/CPU desktop per il gioco.

SistemaCPUMemory.Description: Win32PrioritySeparation=26 (favorisce processi in primo piano). DisablePagingExecutive=1 (kernel in RAM). LargeSystemCache=0.

SistemaBackgroundApps.Description: GlobalUserDisabled=1. Impedisce alle app UWP di girare in background durante il gioco.

SistemaPrivacy.Description: Disabilita consigli, annunci, ricerca web nel menu Start e telemetria inutile. Migliora le prestazioni generali.

SvcSysMain.Description: Precaricamento app — usa RAM e I/O

PowerUltimate.Description: Attiva Ultimate Performance e forza CPU al 100%. Nessun park core, nessun throttling. Richiede riavvio per effetto pieno.
InvokeScript: $e = powercfg /list | Select-String 'Ultimate'; if (-not $e) { powercfg /duplicatescheme e9a42b02-d5df-448d-aa00-03f14749eb61 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; $guid = $null; foreach ($l in (powercfg /list 2>$null)) { if ($l -match 'Ultimate' -and $l -match '([0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12})') { $guid = $matches[1]; break } }; if ($guid) { powercfg /setactive $guid 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog "Ultimate Performance attivato: $guid" 'OK' } else { powercfg /setactive 8c5e7fda-e8bf-4a96-9a85-a6e23a8c635c 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'High Performance attivato (Ultimate non disponibile)' 'WARN' }; powercfg /SETACVALUEINDEX SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_PROCESSOR PROCTHROTTLEMIN 100 2>$null; powercfg /SETACVALUEINDEX SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_PROCESSOR PROCTHROTTLEMAX 100 2>$null; powercfg /setactive SCHEME_CURRENT 2>$null | Out-Null
UndoScript: powercfg /setactive 381b4222-f694-41f0-9685-ff5bb260df2e 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'Power plan ripristinato a Bilanciato' 'OK'

PowerBackup.Description: Esporta le chiavi di registro originali sul Desktop prima di applicare ottimizzazioni. Consigliato eseguirlo per primo.
InvokeScript: $bp = "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\FiveM-Optimizer-Backup"; if (-not (Test-Path $bp)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $bp -Force | Out-Null }; $d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $keys = @('HKCU\Control Panel\Keyboard','HKCU\Control Panel\Mouse','HKCU\Control Panel\Accessibility','HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\mouclass','HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\kbdclass','HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\i8042prt','HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\USB','HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Multimedia\SystemProfile'); foreach ($k in $keys) { $n = $k.Split('\')[-1]; reg export $k "$bp\${d}_$n.reg" /y 2>$null | Out-Null }; Write-FOMLog "Backup completato: $bp" 'OK'; Start-Process explorer.exe -ArgumentList $bp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Per ripristinare: doppio click sui file .reg nella cartella di backup sul Desktop' 'INFO'

PowerNvidiaProfile.Description: Copia config\profile.nip sul Desktop. Impostazioni: VSync=Off, Adaptive Tear Control, Max Pre-Rendered Frames=1, Power=Max Performance, Threaded Opt=On, FXAA=Off, Triple Buffer=Off, Refresh=Highest, FRL Low Latency=On.
InvokeScript: $src="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)\config\profile.nip"; $dst="$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\FiveM-Nvidia-Profile.nip"; if(Test-Path $src){ Copy-Item $src $dst -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog "Profilo Nvidia copiato sul Desktop: $dst" 'OK'; Start-Process explorer.exe -ArgumentList ('/select,'+$dst) -EA SilentlyContinue } else { Write-FOMLog 'profile.nip non trovato — verifica che esista config\profile.nip' 'ERROR' }
UndoScript: Remove-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\FiveM-Nvidia-Profile.nip" -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'Profilo Nvidia rimosso dal Desktop' 'OK'

PowerNvidiaInstall.Content: Installa e Avvia NV Inspector + Profilo
PowerNvidiaInstall.Description: Scarica nvidiaProfileInspector da GitHub (solo se non presente) in tools\nvidiaProfileInspector\, poi lo avvia con il profilo custom gia caricato. Richiede connessione internet solo al primo utilizzo.
InvokeScript:
$toolDir="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)	ools
vidiaProfileInspector"; $exe="$toolDir
vidiaProfileInspector.exe"; $prof="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)\config\profile.nip"; if(-not(Test-Path $exe)){ Write-FOMLog 'NV Inspector non trovato — avvio download da GitHub...' 'INFO'; try{ $api=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.github.com/repos/Orbmu2k/nvidiaProfileInspector/releases/latest' -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; $asset=$api.assets|Where-Object{$_.name -like '*.zip'}|Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $asset){throw 'Nessun asset ZIP trovato nei release assets'}; $kb=[math]::Round($asset.size/1KB,0); Write-FOMLog "Scarico: $($asset.name) ($kb KB)..." 'INFO'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $toolDir -Force -EA SilentlyContinue|Out-Null; $zip="$env:TEMP
pi_download.zip"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $asset.browser_download_url -OutFile $zip -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $toolDir -Force -EA Stop; Remove-Item $zip -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; $found=Get-ChildItem $toolDir -Filter 'nvidiaProfileInspector.exe' -Recurse|Select-Object -First 1; if($found){$exe=$found.FullName; Write-FOMLog "Installato: $exe" 'OK'}else{throw 'exe non trovato dopo estrazione'} }catch{ Write-FOMLog "Errore download: $($_.Exception.Message)" 'ERROR'; return } }else{ Write-FOMLog "NV Inspector gia presente: $exe" 'INFO' }; if(Test-Path $exe){ if(Test-Path $prof){ Start-Process $exe -ArgumentList ('"'+$prof+'"') -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'NV Inspector avviato con profilo custom — clicca Apply changes per applicare' 'OK' }else{ Start-Process $exe -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'NV Inspector avviato (profile.nip non trovato in config\)' 'WARN' } }else{ Write-FOMLog 'Impossibile avviare NV Inspector' 'ERROR' }
UndoScript: $toolDir="$($sync.PSScriptRoot)\tools\nvidiaProfileInspector"; Get-Process -Name 'nvidiaProfileInspector' -EA SilentlyContinue|Stop-Process -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; if(Test-Path $toolDir){ Remove-Item $toolDir -Recurse -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'NV Inspector rimosso da tools\' 'OK' }else{ Write-FOMLog 'NV Inspector non era installato' 'INFO' }

SistemaTelemetria.Description: AllowTelemetry=0. Blocca l'invio di dati diagnostici a Microsoft. Disabilita dmwappushservice.

SistemaActivityHistory.Description: EnableActivityFeed=0, PublishUserActivities=0, UploadUserActivities=0. Impedisce a Windows di registrare le attivita dell'utente.

SistemaConsumerFeatures.Description: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures=1. Impedisce l'installazione automatica di app sponsorizzate.

SistemaLocationTracking.Description: SensorPermissionState=0. Disabilita il rilevamento della posizione GPS/rete.

SistemaStorageSense.Description: Disabilita la pulizia automatica dello spazio disco da parte di Windows.

SistemaCopilot.Description: TurnOffWindowsCopilot=1, ShowCopilotButton=0. Rimuove Copilot dalla Taskbar e disabilita il servizio.

SistemaHibernation.Description: powercfg /h off. Libera spazio su disco eliminando hiberfil.sys (dimensione = RAM installata).
InvokeScript: powercfg /h off 2>$null; Write-FOMLog 'Ibernazione disabilitata' 'OK'
UndoScript: powercfg /h on 2>$null; Write-FOMLog 'Ibernazione riabilitata' 'OK'

SistemaEndTask.Content: End Task con tasto destro Taskbar
SistemaEndTask.Description: TaskbarEndTask=1. Aggiunge la voce Termina processo al menu contestuale della Taskbar.

SistemaTempFiles.Description: Elimina i contenuti di %TEMP% e C:\Windows\Temp per liberare spazio disco.
InvokeScript: Remove-Item -Path "$env:TEMP\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'File temporanei rimossi' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'I file temporanei non possono essere ripristinati' 'INFO'

GamingMPO.Description: OverlayTestMode=5. Risolve stuttering e frame drops causati da MPO su GPU Nvidia/AMD.

GamingIPv6Disable.Description: DisabledComponents=255. Disabilita IPv6 su tutte le interfacce. Riduce overhead DNS/routing.

GamingTeredo.Description: netsh interface teredo set state disabled. Rimuove il tunnel IPv6 non necessario.
InvokeScript: netsh interface teredo set state disabled 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'Teredo disabilitato' 'OK'
UndoScript: netsh interface teredo set state default 2>$null | Out-Null; Write-FOMLog 'Teredo ripristinato' 'OK'

GamingDateTimeUTC.Description: RealTimeIsUniversal=1. Utile per dual boot con Linux per evitare sfasamenti di orario.

DebloatWidgets.Description: TaskbarDa=0. Rimuove il pulsante Widget (notizie/meteo) dalla Taskbar di Windows 11.

DebloatOneDrive.Description: Rimuove completamente Microsoft OneDrive dal sistema. Operazione difficilmente reversibile.
InvokeScript: Stop-Process -Name 'OneDrive' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $x86 = "$env:SystemRoot\System32\OneDriveSetup.exe"; $x64 = "$env:SystemRoot\SysWOW64\OneDriveSetup.exe"; if (Test-Path $x64) { Start-Process $x64 '/uninstall' -Wait -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } elseif (Test-Path $x86) { Start-Process $x86 '/uninstall' -Wait -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\OneDrive" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item 'C:\OneDriveTemp' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'OneDrive disinstallato' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla OneDrive da microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/onedrive/download' 'INFO'

DebloatXbox.Description: Rimuove Xbox App, Game Overlay, Identity Provider e Xbox Speech tramite Remove-AppxPackage.
InvokeScript: Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers 'Microsoft.XboxApp' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers 'Microsoft.XboxGameOverlay' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers 'Microsoft.XboxIdentityProvider' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers 'Microsoft.XboxSpeechToTextOverlay' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers 'Microsoft.Xbox.TCUI' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-FOMLog 'App Xbox rimosse' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla le app Xbox dal Microsoft Store' 'INFO'

DebloatUnwantedApps.Description: Rimuove app preinstallate inutili: Candy Crush, News, Maps, Solitaire, Feedback Hub, Teams, Clipchamp, ecc.
InvokeScript: $apps = @('king.com.CandyCrushSaga','king.com.CandyCrushFriends','king.com.FarmHeroesSaga','Microsoft.BingNews','Microsoft.BingWeather','Microsoft.GetHelp','Microsoft.Getstarted','Microsoft.MicrosoftSolitaireCollection','Microsoft.MixedReality.Portal','Microsoft.People','Microsoft.SkypeApp','Microsoft.Todos','Microsoft.WindowsFeedbackHub','Microsoft.WindowsMaps','Microsoft.ZuneMusic','Microsoft.ZuneVideo','MicrosoftTeams','Clipchamp.Clipchamp'); foreach ($a in $apps) { Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $a -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'Bloatware rimosso' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla le app dal Microsoft Store se necessario' 'INFO'

DebloatEdge.Description: StartupBoostEnabled=0, BackgroundModeEnabled=0. Impedisce a Microsoft Edge di avviarsi in background.

DebloatMicrosoftOffice.Description: Office Hub, OneNote UWP, Sticky Notes, Whiteboard, Power Automate Desktop. Pacchetti produttivita Microsoft inutili su PC gaming. Reinstallabili dal Microsoft Store.
InvokeScript: $apps=@('Microsoft.MicrosoftOfficeHub','Microsoft.Office.OneNote','Microsoft.MicrosoftStickyNotes','Microsoft.Whiteboard','Microsoft.PowerAutomateDesktop'); foreach($a in $apps){ Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $a -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -EA SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -like $a} | Remove-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'App Office Microsoft rimosse' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla le app dal Microsoft Store' 'INFO'

DebloatMicrosoftMedia.Description: Foto, Visualizzatore 3D, Registratore audio, Fotocamera, Sveglie. NOTA: rimuove il visualizzatore foto integrato. Installa un alternativo (IrfanView, XnView, ecc.).
InvokeScript: $apps=@('Microsoft.Windows.Photos','Microsoft.Microsoft3DViewer','Microsoft.WindowsSoundRecorder','Microsoft.WindowsCamera','Microsoft.WindowsAlarms'); foreach($a in $apps){ Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $a -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -EA SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -like $a} | Remove-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'App Media Microsoft rimosse' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla le app dal Microsoft Store' 'INFO'

DebloatMicrosoftComm.Description: Posta e Calendario, Phone Link, Your Phone, Skype. Rimuove il client email integrato: usa Outlook.com via browser oppure un client di terze parti (Thunderbird, ecc.).
InvokeScript: $apps=@('microsoft.windowscommunicationsapps','Microsoft.YourPhone','MicrosoftCorporationII.PhoneLinkforWindows','Microsoft.SkypeApp'); foreach($a in $apps){ Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $a -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -EA SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -like $a} | Remove-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'App Comunicazione Microsoft rimosse' 'OK'
UndoScript: Write-FOMLog 'Reinstalla le app dal Microsoft Store' 'INFO'

DebloatMicrosoftSystem.Description: Assistenza rapida, Cortana UWP, 3D Builder, Stampa 3D, Feedback Hub, Suggerimenti. App sistema Microsoft inutilizzate che consumano RAM e disco.
InvokeScript: $apps=@('MicrosoftCorporationII.QuickAssist','Microsoft.549981C3F5F10','Microsoft.Cortana','Microsoft.3DBuilder','Microsoft.Print3D','Microsoft.WindowsFeedbackHub','Microsoft.Getstarted','Microsoft.GetHelp'); foreach($a in $apps){ Get-AppxPackage -AllUsers $a -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -AllUsers -EA SilentlyContinue; Get-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -like $a} | Remove-AppxProvisionedPackage -Online -EA SilentlyContinue }; Write-FOMLog 'App Sistema Microsoft rimosse' 'OK'
